scripts.build:ui: cd cli/ui && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:cli: rm -rf cli/cmd/core_assets && mkdir -p cli/cmd/core_assets/core && cp -r .qdd/core/* cli/cmd/core_assets/core/ && find cli/cmd/core_assets -type d -empty -exec touch {}/.keep \; && cd cli && go build -o ../qdd
scripts.build: npm run build:ui && npm run build:cli
scripts.install:all: npm run build && npm run install:cli
